title: Bacteriophage Cryopreservation
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.iiyccfw

steps.title: Vortex a freshly lysed culture for 10 sec 00:00:10
steps.instruction: Vortex a freshly lysed culture for 10 sec 00:00:10

steps.title: Add 1 mL of phage into each cryogenic vial undetermined
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of phage into each cryogenic vial undetermined

steps.title: Add 1 mL of 20% glycerol...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of 20% glycerol to each vial with phage undetermined Glycerol growcells.com Catalog #MRGE-4002

steps.title: Remove cryogenic vials one at a time from the freezer
steps.instruction: Remove cryogenic vials one at a time from the freezer

steps.title: Using a sterile pipette tip, scrape...
steps.instruction: Using a sterile pipette tip, scrape a small amount of frozen virus particles into a 20 mL mid-log culture

steps.title: Place cryogenic vials immediately back into the freezer
steps.instruction: Place cryogenic vials immediately back into the freezer

steps.title: Allow to incubate and lyse culture...
steps.instruction: Allow to incubate and lyse culture under constant light conditions appropriate for your specific culture
